backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Prodal Tex app, managing fabric products, customer inquiries, and user profiles with role-based access control (admin/user) and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state to new state, seeding a default 'Ferrari Cheque' fabric product and resetting nextProductId to 1.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with the page title set to 'PRODAL TEX - Premium Fabric Supplier' and a root div for mounting.
frontend/public/google4b05974a4e3c375c.h: Google Search Console ownership verification file containing only the required verification string.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Products, Product Detail, Contact, and Admin Dashboard, all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Prodal Tex brand, quick navigation links, and real business contact details (email, phone, Surat address) with improved text contrast.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links (Home, Products, Contact, Admin), and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button with no auth-gating on any link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper rendering Header and Footer around a TanStack Router Outlet for all child pages.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a clickable fabric product card with image, specs (GSM, width, weight, color), and price, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, customer inquiries, and user profiles against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the brand color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that gates access behind a hardcoded password and displays a table of customer inquiries fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact/inquiry form page that allows users to submit product inquiries, with pre-selection of a product via URL param, form validation, and a success state on submission.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, a features strip, and a featured products grid fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches and displays a single product's image, specs, and pricing, with breadcrumb navigation and a fallback placeholder image.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Products listing page that fetches all products, supports color-based filtering, and handles loading skeletons and error states with a retry button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (brand charcoal, offwhite, teal, plus shadcn-style semantic colors), border radius variables, box shadows, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3 for 'Prodal Tex', with one pending feature request (AR-1) to fix backend seed data so the Ferrari Cheque fabric product is correctly stored and returned by the getProducts endpoint.
